landmarks.name: The Sunken Cathedral
landmarks.visualDescription: Massive brick church with collapsed roof exposing internal ribbed vaults. Bell tower tilted at 15 degrees, cracked stone walls with rebar protruding. Debris field of roof tiles and wooden beams scattered around foundation. Broken stained glass fragments catching light inside roofless nave. Heavy water damage, algae-stained lower walls.
landmarks.originalDescription: St. Michael's Church (Protestant, 1880s), five-bay classic Dutch Reformed brick structure with bell tower, located in town center.
landmarks.meshyPrompt: Large ruined stone church, collapsed roof exposing vault ribs, tilted bell tower, cracked red brick walls with rebar, debris piles, algae stains, heavy water damage, post-apocalyptic, low-poly game asset

landmarks.name: Harbourmaster's Tower
landmarks.visualDescription: Compact brick tower, 3 storeys, upper windows blown out revealing empty interior rooms. Concrete balcony on east face half-collapsed. Rust streaks from broken metal railings and window frames. Paint peeling in large sheets. Military graffiti and warlord symbols spray-painted on lower walls. Single functional window on ground floor, others boarded.
landmarks.originalDescription: Harbourmaster's office and observation tower (1920s-1950s), brick and concrete modernist 3-storey building, overlooking Markermeer harbour.
landmarks.meshyPrompt: 3-storey modernist brick tower, blown-out windows, collapsed balcony, rust streaks, peeling paint, graffiti symbols, military markings, boarded ground window, weathered concrete, low-poly game asset

landmarks.name: The Drowned Market
landmarks.visualDescription: Sprawling concrete arcade, roofing partially collapsed leaving jagged concrete ribs exposed. Dozens of rusted metal vendor stalls overturned and scattered. Scorch marks and bullet holes perforate concrete columns. Standing water pooling on uneven floor. Makeshift barricades constructed from debris. Faded market banners hanging in tatters. Graffiti territorially marking warlord borders.
landmarks.originalDescription: Purmerend Town Market (1960s), concrete arcade structure with covered stalls, central town gathering point historically renovated in 2000s.
landmarks.meshyPrompt: Sprawling concrete market arcade, collapsed roof, jagged concrete ribs, scattered rusted vendor stalls, bullet holes, scorch marks, pooled water, makeshift barricades, faded banners, war-torn, low-poly game asset
landmarks.positionHint: South-west of centre, accessible from main road

keyLocations.name: The Refuge
keyLocations.visualDescription: Repurposed clinic, reinforced with sandbags and barricades. Ribbon windows now mostly shattered with makeshift metal screens. Exterior walls bloodstained and scarred. Red Cross symbols painted on doors (faded). Interior visible through gaps shows jury-rigged medical stations amid rubble. Generator and water tank on roof. Armed lookout post on roof corner.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Purmerend Health Clinic (1970s), single-storey modern brick structure with distinctive horizontal ribbon windows.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: 1970s brick clinic reinforced with sandbags, shattered ribbon windows, metal screens, bloodstained walls, faded red cross, visible makeshift medical stations, roof generator, armed lookout, weathered, low-poly game asset
keyLocations.positionHint: West of centre, near secondary road

keyLocations.name: Scrapyard Bazaar
keyLocations.visualDescription: Stripped warehouse with walls partially removed for ventilation and visibility. Exterior covered in sheet metal and corrugated panels. Mountains of salvaged metal, electronics, and machinery piled outside. Makeshift stalls built from cargo containers and wooden pallets inside. Smoke from forges visible through openings. Mechanical creaking and hammering sounds emanate from interior.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Former municipal warehouse (1950s), large concrete block building used for agricultural storage and light industry.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: Large concrete warehouse, walls partially removed, sheet metal and corrugated panels, salvage piles, cargo container stalls, forges visible, smoke, mechanical debris, weathered industrial, low-poly game asset
keyLocations.positionHint: North-east of centre, on main road

keyLocations.name: Ironbound Fortress
keyLocations.visualDescription: Fortified town hall with gun emplacements on roof and upper windows. Concrete walls reinforced with steel plating and sandbag bunkers. All windows covered except firing ports. Heavy chains and barbed wire surrounding perimeter. Military vehicles and fuel drums visible in courtyard. Guard towers erected at corners. Faded municipal seal barely visible under war paint.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Purmerend Town Hall (1960s), modernist concrete and brick civic building, 3-storey administrative center.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: 3-storey brutalist town hall, fortified with steel plating and sandbags, gun emplacements, covered windows, barbed wire perimeter, guard towers, military vehicles, war paint, heavily defended, low-poly game asset
keyLocations.positionHint: West of centre, near secondary road junction

keyLocations.name: The Tavern of Ash
keyLocations.visualDescription: Small traditional Dutch brick building, roof partially burned and collapsed on rear half. Gable peak still intact but scorched black. Front facade scorched from exterior fires. Cracked windows covered with boards except small gaps. Faint scent of smoke and old beer. Candle and lantern light visible inside at dusk. Worn wooden sign hanging askew, lettering illegible.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Café de Molen (Dutch countryside tavern, early 1900s), traditional brick building with Dutch gable roof and street-facing entrance.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: Small traditional Dutch brick tavern, partially burned roof, collapsed rear, scorched gable, boarded windows, gaps showing candlelight, worn hanging sign, charred wood, weathered, low-poly game asset

keyLocations.name: Rust and Bone Storage
keyLocations.visualDescription: Cylindrical concrete silo with reinforced entry doors. Smaller rectangular annex beside it. Both structures extensively repurposed with new metal frameworks, locking mechanisms, and security measures. Exterior walls stained and weathered. Guard cabin at entrance. No windows visible. Truck-loading ramp visible on one side. Graffiti inventory tallies marking stored supplies.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Former grain silo and agricultural cooperative building (1930s), reinforced concrete cylindrical and rectangular structures.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: Cylindrical concrete silo with reinforced doors, rectangular annex, metal frameworks, security locks, loading ramp, guard cabin, inventory graffiti, stained concrete, heavily secured, low-poly game asset

keyLocations.name: The Prophet's Shrine
keyLocations.visualDescription: Modified community center with ramshackle additions of wood and corrugated metal. Entrance decorated with crude religious iconography and symbols painted on plywood. Interior visible through gaps showing altar made of salvaged wood and metal. Flickering candlelight visible at night. Followers in tattered robes visible through cracks. Faint chanting audible.
keyLocations.originalDescription: Purmerend Community Center (1980s), brick and wood structure with large central meeting hall and smaller side rooms.
keyLocations.meshyPrompt: 1980s brick community center, wooden and corrugated metal additions, crude religious icons, plywood decorations, salvaged wood altar, candlelight glow, followers' robes visible, spiritual atmosphere, apocalyptic cult, low-poly game asset

hazards.description: Structural collapses from ruined buildings claim survivors unpredictably. Market arcade has ongoing partial roof failures.
Uncontrolled fires from faction conflicts and industrial accidents sweep through neighborhoods. Smoke and burning debris hazard.
Harbor storm surge and dyke breaches flood lower districts during heavy weather. Contaminated water pools trap survivors.

spatialSpec.terrainDescription: Flat to gently sloped; waterfront at south-west edge. Post-apocalyptic rubble and debris scattered throughout.
